overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a bustling medieval harbor town. The character moves from a sunny waterfront with tall sailing ships docked along the pier, through narrow streets lined with half-timbered houses, and finally enters a dimly lit tavern with musicians playing inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor promenade with docked sailing ships

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the harbor path with two swords strapped to his back, moving toward the docked ships

notable_agents.action: civilian in red tunic walking along the path

entered.detail: large wooden galleon with multiple masts and white sails docked at the harbor
stacks of wooden cargo barrels and crates piled on the dockside
traditional medieval buildings with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
tall stone tower visible in the distant background of the town
scattered wooden planks and boards lying on the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunny harbor promenade with a large sailing ship docked on the left and medieval half-timbered houses lining the right. The scene is bright and open with clear skies, sparse vegetation, and a few scattered pedestrians moving about the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with wooden crane mechanism

events.description: Geralt turns left to follow the waterfront path around the large wooden crane structure

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns left along the waterfront, navigating around the wooden crane wheel and continuing along the stone parapet

entered.detail: large wooden treadwheel crane used for loading cargo onto ships
low stone wall and parapet along the edge of the waterfront
wooden storage buildings and sheds along the dockside

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the waterfront where a massive wooden crane wheel dominates the center of the view. Geralt turns left to follow the stone parapet, moving past the crane mechanism while the sailing ship remains visible but more distant on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street with half-timbered architecture

events.description: transition from open waterfront to enclosed town street with prominent stone arch building

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the busier street between half-timbered houses, navigating through crowds of townspeople and guards

notable_agents.action: guard in red and silver armor walking toward Geralt

entered.detail: large stone building with rounded archway entrance and wooden doors
wooden fence and railing along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt transitions from the waterfront into a narrower cobblestone street lined with half-timbered houses. A prominent stone arch building stands on the left while more pedestrians and guards populate the path, creating a moderate crowd density.

scene_state.functional_zone: path leading to tavern entrance with upturned boats

events.description: Geralt slows and approaches the tavern doorway, preparing to enter

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks toward the tavern entrance, passing wooden scaffolding and upturned boats along the building exterior

entered.detail: dark wooden doorway with stone frame leading into the tavern interior
small wooden rowboats turned upside down against the building wall
wooden scaffolding and support beams along the tavern exterior

segments.scene_description: The path narrows further as Geralt approaches a tavern entrance. Upturned rowboats and wooden scaffolding line the left side while the dark doorway beckons ahead. The lighting becomes more diffused in the enclosed alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with musicians and patrons

events.description: dramatic shift from bright daylight to warm dim interior candlelight as Geralt enters the tavern

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the tavern and walks toward the center, observing the musicians playing and patrons sitting at tables

notable_agents.action: group of musicians playing lute and drums near the back wall

entered.detail: dimly lit interior space with wooden beams, floors, and support pillars
large stone fireplace with mantle on the far wall
wooden tables and benches where patrons are seated
warm glowing lanterns hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps inside the tavern where the lighting shifts dramatically to warm artificial candlelight. The interior features wooden architecture, a stone fireplace, hanging lanterns, and a group of musicians playing instruments while patrons sit at wooden tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bright medieval waterfront that shifts from an open promenade to a more industrial dockside area. It begins with Geralt walking beside a large sailing ship docked on the left, while half-timbered houses and scattered pedestrians line the sunny, open path to the right. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts toward the center of the harbor where a massive wooden crane wheel begins to dominate the view. The scene then transitions as Geralt turns left to follow a stone parapet, moving past the heavy crane mechanism while the sailing ship recedes into the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, bustling harbor street into the warm, enclosed atmosphere of a local tavern. It begins as Geralt leaves the waterfront and enters a cobblestone street lined with half-timbered houses and a prominent stone arch, moving through a moderate crowd of pedestrians and guards. As the path narrows further, the scene shifts into a confined alleyway where the lighting becomes diffused and the surroundings are cluttered with upturned rowboats and wooden scaffolding. The camera then follows Geralt through a dark doorway, where the environment transforms dramatically from the gray exterior to a dimly lit interior illuminated by warm candlelight. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a rustic tavern filled with wooden architecture, a stone fireplace, and musicians playing for patrons seated at wooden tables.
